prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (engine code: 6.2L HEMI SRT Hellcat - **EFI 6.2L (2015+)**) with a custom billet 10-rib pulley system (ATI Performance) reducing boost lag and increasing output to 950+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump for fuel system reinforcement

Full exhaust overhaul with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel cat-back system (Borla Atak) featuring quad 5-inch carbon-fiber tips (MagnaFlow), coupled with a long-tube header setup (Stainless Works) and a high-flow catalytic converter (HJS 200-cell) to optimize scavenging and reduce backpressure

Suspension reinforcement with a Hellcat-specific KW Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable) featuring solid top mounts (Vorshlag) and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension), paired with an SRT Hellcat-specific sway bar upgrade (Hotchkis Sport Suspension) and a Hellcat-tuned air suspension delete kit (Air Lift Performance)
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Dodge Durango SRT Hellcat-specific Rocket Bunny V2 kit (Pandem) with carbon-fiber fender flares, custom front splitter, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all finished in a matte Hyper Black (PPG) with gloss black accents

Custom Hellcat-specific front grille insert (T-REX Grilles) featuring a mesh design with a carbon-fiber overlay and a functional hood scoop reinforcement (Seibon Carbon) to improve airflow to the supercharger

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard (EuroCompulsion), Hellcat-logo embroidered Recaro SPG XL seats (with Schroth 6-point harnesses), and a custom roll cage (Autopower Industries) painted in gloss red to match the Hellcat Redline exterior
